podcasts.title: The Heartfelt Music of Bluey w/ Composer Joff Bush
podcasts.transcript: What makes the music of Bluey feel so warm and alive? In this episode, Dallas travels to Brisbane, Australia to visit the studio of BlueyвАЩs composer Joff Bush. There, Joff reveals the quirky instruments, musical easter eggs, and songwriting philosophy behind this beloved series.
